issues.title: debt: logger do @vyx/worker não lê automaticamente do AsyncLocalStorage (#64 pendência)
[Feature] Worker-Initiated Remote Connection (Pull Model / Multi-Host Support)
[Feature] UDS Connection Warm Pool (Pre-established Connection Sliding Window)
[Feature] Pluggable Client IP Resolver (X-Forwarded-For / X-Real-IP support)
[Feature] CLI / TUI for Real-Time Distributed Log Tailing and Search
[Feature] Standardized Structured Logging across Polyglot Workers
[Feature] CI/CD pipeline: annotation scanning and testing in build
acceptance_summary: GitHub Actions workflow runs on every PR to `main`
Pipeline steps:
On push to `main`: build artifacts are published as a GitHub Release
Test coverage report posted as a PR comment
Workers can be tested by mocking the core or using a test core instance

issues.title: [Feature] Kubernetes operator integration
acceptance_summary: Custom Resource Definition (CRD): `VyxApp` to describe a vyx project deployment
Operator manages core and worker Deployments, Services, and ConfigMaps
Supports rolling updates with zero downtime
Integrates with HorizontalPodAutoscaler for worker pool scaling
Liveness and readiness probes configured automatically from heartbeat endpoint

issues.title: [Feature] Documentation: guides, API reference and annotated examples
acceptance_summary: **Getting Started** guide: install, scaffold, run first project
**Annotation Reference**: full spec for `@Route`, `@Validate`, `@Auth`, `@Page`
**CLI Reference**: all commands with flags and examples
**`vyx.yaml` Reference**: all configuration keys documented
**Architecture Overview**: how core, workers, and IPC interact

issues.title: [Feature] TLS termination and security hardening
acceptance_summary: Core manages TLS certificates and terminates HTTPS (HTTP/1.1 and HTTP/2)
Support for automatic certificate renewal (Let's Encrypt / ACME)
Header sanitization applied to all incoming requests
Workers run under restricted filesystem access (configurable)
Rate limiting enforced per IP and per token (configurable limits in `vyx.yaml`)

issues.title: [Feature] Observability: structured logging, Prometheus metrics and OpenTelemetry tracing
acceptance_summary: Core and workers emit **structured JSON logs** with: `level`, `timestamp`, `service`, `correlation_id`
`/metrics` endpoint exposes Prometheus metrics:
**OpenTelemetry** trace headers propagated from core to workers via message metadata
Sample **Grafana dashboard** JSON provided in `infra/grafana/`
Correlation ID generated per request and included in all downstream logs

issues.title: [Feature] Hot reload: file watching and zero-downtime worker restart in dev mode
acceptance_summary: In `vyx dev`, core watches backend and frontend directories for file changes
On change, the affected worker is gracefully restarted (drain in-flight requests first)
Frontend (React/Node SSR) reloads without full core restart
In production, `SIGUSR1` triggers a zero-downtime reload: new worker starts before old one stops
Reload events are logged with timestamps and affected worker IDs

issues.title: [Feature] Worker pools and round-robin load balancing
acceptance_summary: `vyx.yaml` allows defining multiple instances per worker (e.g., `replicas: 4`)
Core spawns and manages all instances in the pool
Requests are balanced using **round-robin** by default
**Least-loaded** strategy available as an option
Unhealthy instances are removed from the pool and replaced

issues.title: [Feature] Apache Arrow IPC for large dataset transfers
acceptance_summary: Core and workers can exchange Arrow `RecordBatch` payloads via UDS
Zero-copy via `mmap` / shared memory when payload exceeds threshold
Fallback to streaming chunks when volume exceeds memory limits
Small payloads continue to use MsgPack (no regression)
Clear threshold configuration in `vyx.yaml`
